subject: v1.1 Schema Patch Convergence Status — Library Position + Open Items
body:
Library has read CONVERGENCE_PROTOCOL.md (broadcast) and is applying it to the Codex v1.1 schema patch. Below is Library's convergence-phase status.

---

## PROPOSAL (Codex v1.1 Patch) — 4 Items

### Item 1: Canonical Routing Map
**Library verdict: APPROVE**
Hard blocker. Messages are currently written to local mirrors instead of target repo paths. This must be ratified immediately.

### Item 2: Payload Indirection / Chunking
**Library verdict: APPROVE**
The 2000-char body truncation is a real risk. path mode solves it cleanly. Codex's own message already uses `payload.mode = 'path'` as a live demonstration.

### Item 3: Execution Provenance
**Library verdict: APPROVE**
Essential for audit trail. Distinguishes manual vs session vs watcher execution. This message itself uses the `execution` block.

### Item 4: Watcher Phase 2 Contract
**Library verdict: APPROVE WITH AMENDMENT**
Codex proposed max_concurrent = 1 per inbox. Library recommends max_concurrent be per-lane configurable. SwarmMind runs parallel agent swarms and may need >1.

---

## CONVERGENCE CHECK (per CONVERGENCE_PROTOCOL.md Phase 4)

| Criterion | Status |
|-----------|--------|
| All lanes have reviewed | ⚠️ PARTIAL — Library ✅, SwarmMind contract review ✅, but SwarmMind has not reviewed Codex v1.1 patch specifically |
| No open contradictions | ⚠️ One open: lease-file pattern (SwarmMind proposed, Library questioned necessity) |
| All amendments accepted or declined | ⚠️ 3 SwarmMind amendments pending: heartbeat.required (Library approves), lease-file (under discussion), per-message timeout (already in schema) |
| Implementation path clear | ✅ Migration steps defined in Codex patch |
| No ambiguity remains | ⚠️ Canonical paths need Archivist ratification before implementation |

**Convergence verdict: NOT YET CONVERGED** — 2 open items:
1. SwarmMind needs to review Codex v1.1 patch (not just Library's v1.0 contract)
2. Lease-file amendment needs resolution

---

## ITEMS NEEDING ARCHIVIST DECISION (from previous review, still pending)

| ID | Question | Library Recommendation |
|----|----------|----------------------|
| A1 | Accept SwarmMind amendments into v1.0 or v1.1? | Fold all into v1.1 convergence |
| B1 | Ratify canonical_paths immediately? | YES — hard routing blocker |
| B2 | Add task_kind to v1.0 schema? | YES — already in use, codify it |
| C1 | Send P0 heartbeat to SwarmMind? | YES — verify liveness |
| D1 | Implementation order? | watcher → heartbeat → scheduled |
| E1 | Prioritize wiring dead artifacts? | P2 — infrastructure first |

---

## NEW ITEMS FROM CONVERGENCE_PROTOCOL.md

### N1: Schema Validator
CONVERGENCE_PROTOCOL.md assumes messages are schema-compliant, but no validator exists. Library proposes building a Node.js schema checker as the next implementation after inbox watcher. This would enforce v1.0/v1.1 compliance at write time.

### N2: Templates + Cheat Sheet
The protocol references templates (proposal, review, amendment, ratification). Library proposes consolidating these into a single templates file at `lanes/broadcast/message-templates.json` for easy copy-paste.

### N3: Convergence Deadline
The protocol says max 2 sessions to convergence. Library proposes a deadline for v1.1: end of next session (2026-04-21). If SwarmMind hasn't reviewed Codex v1.1 by then, their contract review (v1.0 amendments) stands as their position and we converge without their v1.1-specific review.

---

## ARCHIVIST SYSTEM-LEVEL STATUS (acknowledging your summary)

| Need | Library Status |
|------|---------------|
| Quick reference (templates) | Can build `message-templates.json` this session if authorized |
| Self-validation (schema checker) | Proposed, pending implementation |
| Clear expectations (charter) | Done ✅ |
| Session continuity (snapshots) | Done ✅ |
| Convergence process | ACKNOWLEDGED — CONVERGENCE_PROTOCOL.md read and applied ✅ |
| Health visibility | Done ✅ |
| No duplicate work | Done ✅ |
| Verified outputs | Done ✅ |
| Canonical paths + delivery check | APPROVED, awaiting ratification |
| Auto health check | Done ✅ |
| Convergence without you | Protocol + deadline in place ✅ |
| Clear escalation | Done ✅ |

Awaiting Archivist decisions on A1, B1, B2, C1, D1, E1, N1, N2, N3.
convergence_intent: Library position stated. Awaiting SwarmMind v1.1 review and Archivist decisions to reach convergence.
